titleStmt.title: SII 39.193: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 193. (A.R. No. 193 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL DĒVARĀYA MAHARĀYA ‘WHO WITNESSED THE ELEPHANT-HUNT’-ŚAKA 1360 (1438 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of temple land to various servants and functionaries of the temple, on condition that they should not involve themselves in the sale or mortagage of those lands. This was made in the presence of the agent of Lakkappa-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭaliśvaran hariirāyavibhāṭaṉ rājādhirāja Irājaparameśvaran śrī vira gajaveṭṭai kaṇṭa tevarāya mahā Irāyaṟkuc
cellāniṉṟa sahābdam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupatiṉ mel cellā niṉṟa kālayukti samvat sarattu mituna nāyaṟṟu purvapakṣattu
kaiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu t tāmāṟkoṭṭattut tāmalnāṭṭut tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi yi
yil perumāḷ poreṟṟu nayiṉār śrī paṇṭārattārom Ikkoyilil palapaṭi nimantam peṟuvāṟku Aṭaipput tirumukaṅkuṭuttapaṭi Irāyar poṉakattu Ilakka
ṇa nāyakkar kāriyattukkuk kaṭava maturai Otuvitta nayiṉār makaṉār kecavapperumāḷ muṉpu Āka purvattilp paṭittarappaṇikkup paṇivilakkai niṅkalāka nellum
Ilakkaikkut tiruppuṭkuḻi nayiṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tiruviṭaiāṭṭam paḻavarkattil nāṟpāṟ kellaiyil Uṭpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nilattil Aṭaitta vicaiyarākavappaṭṭaṟku ppicā
tam tiṅka kku 22 10 5 kālvāriyam Aruḷāḷappaṭṭaṟku kuḻi 6 100 maṭivaḷavu tiruvanantāḻvāṟku
kuḻi niṅkalāka kuḻi 100 2 10 5 pica ṭai Aṉaittum ceṅkaṇṭa nampikku kuḻi 1000 100 2 10 5 picātayiṭai poṉ muṭiyum poreṟṟukku kuḻi 100 5 10 śrī paṇṭārikaṟkup picātam niṅkalāka
100 5 10 koyiṟkaṇakku tiruppuṭkuḻi piriyaṟkup picātam niṅkalāka 9 100 śrī vaiṣṇavakkaṇakku kuḻi 100 5 10 tirumeykāval tirukkaikkoḷaṟkup picātam niṅkalāka Ākappaḻavakaram
kaṇakkaṉpaṭṭikku pitta kuḻi 145 Itukku paḻavakkattil kaṇṭu kāṇāta nilam paṇṇaippaṟṟil māṟṟāntāṅkal kiḻppokal vaḻikku meṟku 100 Itilum maṭuvuk
kutteṟku Iraṇṭu niṅkalāka kuḻi 2 100 Itukku Arai vāci Ēṟṟi kuḻi 3 100 Āka kuḻi tuḷāyirattile viṭakkaṭavatu Ākavum maṟṟāntāṅkal nir nilam paṭum kaṭavatu Ākavum
Iṭakkaṭavatu Ākavum tantaram nilaṅkaḷile kiṇaṟu veṭṭiṉāl veṭṭiṉavaṉe Iṟaittukkoḷḷai
k kaṭavaṉa Ākavum tantānukkai viḻunta viḻukkāṭṭile nellu Ilakkaikku sarvamānyam Āka kkoṇṭu tantarantuṟai Aṭaivile sevaipa
ṇṇak kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Innilaṅkaḷile yātoruvaṉ viṟkutal Oṟṟivaikkutal ceytāruṇṭāṉāl camai turoki Irāca turoki paṭṭatum paṭṭu paṇṭā
rattār niṟceyitta teṇṭam Iṟukkak kaṭavāṉ Ākavum paḻa vakarattil Ērimiṉ Eriyile Iṭakkaṭavatu Ākavum Immatikāri kaikkoṇṭu candrātitya
varaiyum Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum Innilaṅkaḷ Irājavipāṭaṉ kolāle Aṭaittapaṭiyāle Ituve Aṭaipput tirumukam Ākak koḷ
kavum Ippaṭikku Ivai koyiṟkaṇakku kaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tiruppuṭkuḻi piriyaṉ Eḻuttu: Ivai govin=tadāsaya te śubhamastu §
Digital edition of SII 39.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
